titleStmt.title: SII 24.447: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 447. (A.R. No. 324 of 1950-51.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, WEST WALL, SOUTH END.

summary.p: Records an endowment of 146 poṉ by Akkāchchi-Amman for offerings on the fourth day of the recital of the Vedas and Tiruvāymoḻi (periya tiruvadhyayanam vēdapārāyaṇam). The endowment was entrusted into the hands of Kōyil Kandāḍai Aṇṇaṉ, the preceptor of Mahāmaṇḍalesvara Bhānukulabhūshaṇa Salakayyadēva and Akkāchchi-Ammaṉ. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1462, Sārvarin, Mīṉa ba. 7, Friday, Mūla, regularly correspond to 1541 A.D. March 18, Friday, ·96 ·81.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . prītibhogya śakkasyābde
svastiśrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvira Accyuta devamahārāyar prithivi
rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10§ṉ melc cellāniṉṟa sārvari samvatsara mīnanāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum śukra vāramumpeṟṟa mūlanakṣatrattu nāḷ tenkarai pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāva
ṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
leśvararāya bhānukulabhūṣaṇam śrīcalakayadevamahārājāvin Ācāryyan vādhūlagotrattu Āpastampa sūtrattu
koyil kantāṭai Aṇṇaṉ śrīāttilRead śrīhastattilAkkācci Ammaṉ dharmmamākakkaṭṭaḷai paṇṇi śilāśāsanam paṇṇivittapaṭi
varuṣam varuṣam toṟum cuvāmi raṅganāthadevariṭṭa periya tiruvaddhye[*ya]nam vedapārāyaṇattirunāḷ ṉālā
ntirunāḷil tiruvāymoḻi Oṉṟum tevarc ciṟappukku poliūṭṭāka samarpitta pon_100 4 10 6
Intap poṉ nūṟṟuṉāṟpattuāṟum Aśītibhāgo vṛttiśyāt Enkiṟa dharmmaśāstrappaṭiyile māsam
Oṉṟukku Eṇpatuppaṇattukku Oru paṇam Enkiṟa nyāyappaṭiyile māsam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭikkuk kū
ṭṭiṉa poṉ 1 U Ava Āka varuṣam 1- kku māsam 10 2-kku vaṭṭikku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 2 10 1 U t
kkuc cilavu poriamutu Aṟukalattukku campāram Uḷpaṭa U 10 2 Atirasam paṭi 6 kku Uru
3 100 6- kku poṉ 1 U Arai vaṭai paṭi 6-kku Uru 3 100 6-kku U 6 cukiyaṉ paṭi 6-kku Uru 3 100 6 kku U 9
campātaḷikai 100-kku poṉ10¥ kaṟi Amutu vakai kompil Añcu koṭiyil Añcu pāl
Amutu neyyamutu vellamutukkuk Amutu teṅkāy paḻam karumpu miḷaku campāram E
rikarumpu Uḷpaṭṭa vakai kku poṉ 6 Aṭai Aṭaik kāyamutu^2^ Ilaiyamutu 2 1000 cāttuppa
ṭi kku U 2 viṇṇappa(m)ñ ceyvāṟku U 1 cīṟa puru Āka 2 10 1 poṉ U 9 Āka
vakaippaṭikku mutaliṭṭa poṉ 100 4 10 6- m kuṟaiyāmal Irukkaiyile varuṣam varuṣam torum
cadrādityavaraiyum varuṣam 1-kku vaṭṭiyil kūṭṭi ^1^ koṇṭe 9kku māsa
cai trana teva ciṟappu perumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷi nityappaṭik kaṭṭaḷai ṉālil O
ṉṟum ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷaikku pattil Oṉṟum I lattu naṭantu varukiṟapaṭiyile
ciṟappukku Oṉṟum Akkācci Ammaṉ Ācāriyan koyil kantāṭai Aṇṇa
mutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku
sanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇa
kku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.447 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
